title: Phase 1 objective
content: Phase 1 aims to build a small, reliable, and testable research agent. The main focus is explicit orchestration, Pydantic validation, integration with FastAPI and a React frontend, use of PostgreSQL with pgvector, and automated evaluation.

title: Agent workflow
content: The planned workflow includes question classification, collection planning, tool execution, evidence consolidation, structured answer generation, and automatic evaluation of final quality.

title: Phase 1 boundaries
content: Fine-tuning, Redis, MongoDB, WebSockets, and a full MCP server remain out of scope for phase 1. The goal is to prioritize a functional baseline that is easy to debug and built around clear contracts before expanding the architecture.
